steps.title: Identify the volume pattern
steps.content: The passage states: “musicians tended to listen at higher volumes than nonmusicians did.” This is the decisive clue for predicting how the two types of listeners will play a shared favorite.

steps.title: Determine the nonmusician's volume
steps.content: D states the nonmusician plays the favorite at less than 85.5 dB, reflecting the musician-louder pattern. A and B make claims about different songs beyond the shared favorite, while C reverses the musician-nonmusician relationship. That matches choice D — D is correct.
